title: SelfImprovementLoop core module + LoopIteration state machine
goal: Land src/backend/handshake_core/src/self_improve/mod.rs and src/backend/handshake_core/src/self_improve/loop_core.rs implementing the Karpathy autoresearch one-iteration pattern per RW-6: a typed LoopIteration state machine with stages ChooseTarget -> IsolateEditableSurface -> RunInSandbox -> ExecuteEval -> AcceptReject -> RecordAsMemory. The loop core is engine-only; metric/safeguard/promotion concerns land in downstream D.2 MTs.
expected_diff_shape: New modules src/backend/handshake_core/src/self_improve/mod.rs + src/backend/handshake_core/src/self_improve/loop_core.rs + src/backend/handshake_core/src/self_improve/iteration.rs (LoopIteration state machine + LoopIterationError enum). Tests src/backend/handshake_core/tests/self_improve_loop_core_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: D.1 MemoryCapsule primitives + persistence + e2e land first (loop reads + writes capsules + retrieval policy via the typed surface).
implementation_notes: Per RW-6 synthesis: 'Karpathy autoresearch one-iteration pattern (target -> eval -> propose -> review -> accept/reject)'. The loop is bounded: one iteration is one pass through the state machine; multiple iterations are driven by a separate scheduler (MT-152 + MT-156). State machine: `pub enum LoopStage { ChooseTarget, IsolateEditableSurface, RunInSandbox, ExecuteEval, AcceptReject, RecordAsMemory, Complete }`. `pub struct LoopIteration { iteration_id: Uuid (v7), iteration_number: u32, stage: LoopStage, target: Option<LoopTarget>, editable_surface_snapshot: Option<EditableSurfaceSnapshot>, sandbox_run_id: Option<Uuid>, eval_result: Option<EvalResult>, decision: Option<AcceptRejectDecision>, started_at_utc, updated_at_utc, completed_at_utc }`. LoopTarget (V0): `pub enum LoopTarget { ModelManualCapsuleText { manual_section_id: String }, RetrievalPolicyParams { task_type: TaskType, parameter: PolicyParameter } }` where PolicyParameter is the closed enum `{ TopK, CapsuleBudgetBytes }` so the editable surface is provably finite. EditableSurfaceSnapshot: typed before+after of the surface to be modified (e.g., `{ before_text: String, after_text: String }` for ModelManual, `{ before_value: u64, after_value: u64 }` for policy params). AcceptRejectDecision: `{ Accept { rationale: String, signed_off_by: OperatorId }, Reject { rationale: String } }`. Core API: `pub trait LoopStageExecutor` with one method per stage so each stage is independently testable + swappable. Loop driver: `pub fn run_one_iteration(prior_iterations: &[LoopIteration], target_picker: &dyn TargetPicker, surface: &dyn EditableSurfaceProvider, sandbox: &dyn LoopSandbox, evaluator: &dyn Evaluator, gate: &dyn OperatorGate, recorder: &dyn IterationRecorder) -> Result<LoopIteration, LoopIterationError>`. Tests: state machine advances stage-by-stage; cannot skip stages; rejected iteration short-circuits past RecordAsMemory; iteration_id is v7; iteration_number monotonic per loop instance.
risk_if_missed: Without a typed iteration state machine the loop becomes ad-hoc procedural code that cannot be reasoned about, replayed, or gated.
validator_focus: LoopStage is a closed enum; stage advancement is total; iteration is replayable from its persisted state. No LLM call inside the engine module.

minimum_controls: LoopStage transitions are total and tested for every legal pair; illegal transitions return typed error.
LoopTarget is a closed enum so a future contributor cannot widen the editable surface without changing the type.
Engine module has no LLM dependency; the proposer is injected as a trait so test runs are deterministic.
